security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.x.ai https://api.mistral.ai https://api.deepseek.com https://api.groq.com https://openrouter.ai https://*.ollama.ai
